race.description: Great Northern Long Run Maiden Handicap
race.comment: NOTFORTHEMONEY (7) went forward from a wide draw last time out to race on the speed but faded in the run home to finish 11th of 13 over 1400m at Townsville. Will go forward to race on the pace and in his third run this prep will strip fitter and is expected to figure in the finish. HERE'S MASON (11) after making a poor beginning raced well back in the running and failed to fire, finishing sixth of 11 over 1300m at Mackay last start. Looks well placed and over a longer trip can return to form. BELVEDERE MISS (4) came home strongly from sixth of eight into the turn last start to finish a head second over 1100m at Mackay on debut when well supported. Fitter and can go one better. LEICA FLAMINGO (9) closed off nicely when finishing a close-up fourth of nine over 1200m at this track last start when sent out at long odds. Racing over a longer trip today will be well supported to take this race out.
